ocr_findings.description: Ruby readings 'たつ', 'ビーシー', 'ビーシーシー' above To/Cc/Bcc in table appear as separate standalone lines in OCR rather than inline ruby; content preserved, layout differs
試験にはコレが出る！ box: OCR renders 'つしが出る！' instead of 'コレが出る！'; the icon/mascot label 'コレ' is partially misread as 'つし'

reviewer_notes: Page 481 of the source. Email fields table with full To/Cc/Bcc descriptions, CcとBccの意味 sidebar, exam tip box, and Web/RSS section start. All substantive content reproduced. Table cell text is complete and accurate. The 'コレ→つし' wrong_char in the icon label is cosmetic.
